headline: 3 Assets That Could Explode When Interest Rates Drop
summary: Federal Reserve is facing pressure to lower interest rates amidst concerns of a slowing economy and scrutiny on Jerome Powell. High-growth tech stocks and cryptocurrencies could see a surge in value if the Fed shifts into easing mode.

headline: Unlocking Q2 Potential of D.R. Horton (DHI): Exploring Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for D.R. Horton (DHI), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.
